artifact_title: Migration Note: Scheduler Evidence Sufficiency for Artifact Non-Inferiority Experiments

claims.text: Goal 9 kept SchedulerClock as the deterministic semantic baseline for scheduler experiments.
Goal 9 did not build a daemon, sleep loop, wall-clock SLA, or production process supervisor.
Goal 9 paired DES and wall-clock smoke tests passed for due ordering, expiration, next-wake reporting, and restart frontier recovery.

conclusion: The scheduler evidence is insufficient to warrant continuation to artifact non-inferiority experiments due to the absence of production scheduler components.
declared_losses: No production scheduler features (daemon, SLA) are built or tested; only DES/wall-clock smoke tests passed.
recommended_action: Do not proceed with artifact non-inferiority experiments until a production scheduler with daemon, SLA, and process supervisor is implemented and tested.
